brief_justification: Agent correctly concludes No with valid math and even strengthens the case by noting position 42 reduces usable space to 41U; goes beyond surface answer by layering the cable management constraint on top of the raw space deficit and offering four concrete remediation paths; no explicit self-monitoring language — agent proceeds linearly without naming potential errors or checking assumptions mid-analysis; verification is implicit via the itemized table and constraint cross-check but no independent re-derivation from a different angle; hedges appropriately on the airflow-spacer workaround with 'if' and 'might' but does not formally distinguish assumptions from facts elsewhere; four alternatives are enumerated and one is partially evaluated with a specific caveat (still 3U short), satisfying systematic consideration; every line item is shown with count, unit size, and subtotal, giving a fully reproducible derivation chain.
